UnitAbilities.Title: Jet Pack Insertion
UnitAbilities.Text: At the end of your opponent’s Movement phase, one or more units embarked within this Transport can disembark from it, provided every model in each of those disembarking units has the Deep Strike ability.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-9 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-9 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: TRANSPORT
Infos.Text: This model has a transport capacity of 48 T’au Empire Infantry models. This model can also transport up to 6 Battlesuit models (these models take up the space of a number of models equal to their Wounds characteristic, e.g. a Battlesuit with a Wounds characteristic of 8 would take up the space of 8 models). This model cannot transport Kroot or Vespid Stingwings models.

UnitAbilities.Title: Markerlight
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has the Markerlight keyword.

UnitAbilities.Title: Drone Escort
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, in your opponent’s Shooting phase, when a friendly T'au Empire unit within 6" of this unit is selected as the target of an attack, one unit from your army with this ability can use it. If it does, after that enemy unit has finished making its attacks, the unit using this ability can shoot as if it were your Shooting phase, but when resolving those attacks it can only target that enemy unit (and only if it is an eligible target).

Options: Kroot bolt thrower and Kroot rifle

UnitAbilities.Title: Baggage Harness (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly Kroot unit is within 3" of the bearer, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Loping Stride
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model.

UnitAbilities.Title: Outflank
UnitAbilities.Text: When this unit arrives from Strategic Reserves, it can be set up within your opponent’s deployment zone (all other restrictions still apply).

UnitAbilities.Title: Thunderous Pounce
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, until the end of the turn, Knarloc beak and talons equipped by models in this unit have the [LANCE] ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Blacklight Marker Drones
UnitAbilities.Text: Twice per battle, when this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a ranged attack is made by a model in their Guided unit that targets their Spotted unit, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Designer’s Note
UnitAbilities.Text: Place two Blacklight Marker Drone tokens next to this model, removing one each time this ability has been used.

UnitAbilities.Title: Eclipse Field Generator
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Assassin
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

Weapons.Name: Experimental pulse submunitions rifle – ionic cluster-beam shell

UnitAbilities.Title: Battlesuit Support System
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back, but when doing so only models equipped with this wargear can make ranged attacks.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shield Generator
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer has a 4+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Weapon Support System
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time the bearer makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Photon Casters
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if an enemy Infantry unit was hit by one or more of those attacks, until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is stunned. While a unit is stunned, subtract 2 from that unit’s Move characteristic, and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Marker Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit has the Markerlight keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shield Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic

UnitAbilities.Title: Orbital Comms Array (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly T'au Empire unit is within 6" of this Fortification, each time you target that unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reinforced Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Sentinel Protocols
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time you select this Fortification for the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

UnitAbilities.Title: Reinforced Cover
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a model, if that model is not fully visible to every model in the attacking unit because of this Fortification, that model has the Benefit of Cover against that attack.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fortification
UnitAbilities.Text:
While an enemy unit is only within Engagement Range of one or more Fortifications from your army:
	▪ That unit can still be selected as the target of ranged attacks, but each time such an attack is made, unless it is made with a Pistol, subtract 1 from the Hit roll. 
	▪ Models in that unit do not need to take Desperate Escape tests due to Falling Back while Battle-shocked, except for those that will move over enemy models when doing so.

UnitAbilities.Title: Crisis Commander
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Marker Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit has the Markerlight keyword and can act as an Observer unit for another unit even if it Advanced this turn.

UnitAbilities.Title: Shield Drone
UnitAbilities.Text: Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic

UnitAbilities.Title: Duality Shield
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, each time an attack targets this unit, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have a 2+ invulnerable save.

UnitAbilities.Title: Paradox of Duality
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Supreme Loyalty (Aura)
UnitAbilities.Text: While a friendly T’au Empire unit is within 6" of this unit, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, add 1 to that test. 4+ INVULNERABLE SAVE

UnitAbilities.Title: Inspirational Defiance
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Martial Warrior
UnitAbilities.Text:
Each time this model is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to be active while resolving those attacks:
	▪ Direct Grace: Fidelity has the [PRECISION] ability. 
	▪ Forceful Strike: Fidelity has the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability. 
	▪ Whirling Stance: Fidelity has the [SUSTAINED HITS 2] ability instead of [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

UnitAbilities.Title: Armour Hunter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle, add 1 to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Targeting Array
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model is selected to shoot, you can re-roll one Hit roll or you can re-roll one Wound roll when resolving its attacks. XV02 Pilot Battlesuit: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Hammerhead Gunship unit within 12". Until the start of your next Command phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

Infos.Title: CRISIS BODYGUARD
Infos.Text: If a Character unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a Crisis Fireknife Battlesuit unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.

UnitAbilities.Title: Battlesuit Support System
UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nova Shielding
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, when this model is selected as the target of a ranged attack, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Text: This model is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Nova Burst
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, before this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, it has a Move characteristic of 18".

UnitAbilities.Title: Weapon Support System
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: High-intensity Markerlights
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit is an Observer unit, until the end of the phase, each time a model in its Guided unit makes an attack that targets their Spotted unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Aerial Disengagement
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6".

UnitAbilities.Title: Agile Dogfighter
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time an attack targets this model, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

Infos.Title: DAMAGED: 1-5 WOUNDS REMAINING
Infos.Text: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

UnitAbilities.Title: Volley Fire
UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit.

UnitAbilities.Title: Veteran Scout
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 7", it gains the Scouts 7" ability, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Pathfinder Team.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cunning Ambush
UnitAbilities.Text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly T'au Empire unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire Discipline
UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Title: Warrior Bond
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, you can select one friendly T'au Empire unit that is Battle-shocked and within 12" of this model. That unit is no longer Battle-shocked.

UnitAbilities.Title: Strategic Redeployment
UnitAbilities.Text: The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

UnitAbilities.Title: Broadside Battlesuit
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 5", its Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 2+, and its Wounds characteristic to 10. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Vehicle and Walker keywords, and remove the Infiltrators and Stealth abilities. It can be equipped with up to three ranged weapons, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Broadside Battlesuits.

UnitAbilities.Title: War Leader
UnitAbilities.Text: Once per battle round, one unit from your army with this ability can be targeted with a Stratagem for 0CP, even if another unit from your army has already been targeted with that Stratagem this phase.

UnitAbilities.Title: Kalamandra
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Move characteristic to 12", its Toughness characteristic to 5, its Save characteristic to 5+, its Wounds characteristic to 6, and it is equipped with 1 kalamandra’s bite in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword and it gains the Lone Operative ability.

UnitAbilities.Title: Krootox
UnitAbilities.Text: Change this model’s Toughness characteristic to 6, its Save characteristic to 5+ and its Wounds characteristic to 7, and it is equipped with 1 Rampager fists in addition to the weapons you choose in Step 4. Remove the Infantry keyword, add the Mounted keyword, and replace the list of units this model can be attached to: Krootox Rampagers, Krootox Riders.

UnitAbilities.Title: Cunning Ambush
UnitAbilities.Text: After both players have deployed their armies, you can redeploy this model’s unit and one other friendly T'au Empire unit. When doing so, any of those units can be placed into Strategic Reserves, regardless of how many units are already in Strategic Reserves.

UnitAbilities.Title: Fire and Fade
UnitAbilities.Text: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

UnitAbilities.Text: Each time this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

UnitAbilities.Text: While this model is leading a unit, melee weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.
